Statute.Title: Yale First Nation Final Agreement Act
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Accord définitif concernant la Première Nation de Yale)

Minister.Text: Introduced by Minister of Aboriginal Affairs and Northern Development

Section.Label: 1 to 17
Section.Text: 2013, c. 25 (Note: ss. 1 to 17 repealed before coming into force)

General.Text: General, 2013, c. 25, s. 14 (application of laws of British Columbia)

CIF.Text: CIF, 2013, c. 25, s. 18 in force on assent 19.06.2013, except,

Item.Text: — ss. 1 to 17, 19 to 23 and 24 repealed before coming into force 31.12.2025 see 2008, c. 20, s. 3 (Statutes Repeal Act), see also Canada Gazette, Part I, Vol. 160, No. 9, pp. 197-198
